title: ease-design component registry
description: Validates a component registry file listing UI components with their canonical names, markup, token usage, variants, and states.

version.description: Semver string for this registry snapshot.

name.description: Canonical name in Category/Variant form, e.g. Button/Primary or Card/Pricing.

category.description: Component category, e.g. action, form, layout.

markup.description: Representative HTML/JSX snippet showing the component structure.

tokensUsed.description: Semantic token paths consumed by this component, e.g. color.primary, space.4.

variants.description: Named variants, e.g. primary, secondary, ghost.

description.description: Human-readable description of the component's purpose.

scope.description: Reuse scope (spec 004): 'local' = owned by this project's DS; 'global' = a published/shared library component. Semantically required, but omitted here from the required list so pre-migration registries stay valid — a missing value is read as 'local'.

deprecated.description: Soft-deprecation flag (spec 004). Absent or false = active; true = deprecated (the audit reads this). Distinct from lifecycle 'status'.
